rows.label: xs33580100_MSG0010
rows.name: Ah, thank goodness! You were safe too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33580100_MSG0020
rows.name:
When I came to, I was here, and I
was wondering what to do, but[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33580100_MSG0030
rows.name:
I remembered what my brother taught me long
ago, so I sent up a flare and waited.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33580100_MSG0040
rows.name:
[ST:wide ]—Oh, I'm sorry. I ended up
doing all the talking.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33580100_MSG0050
rows.name:
It's not as if everything is over
yet, but I felt a little relieved.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33580100_MSG0060
rows.name: But leave it to me. I can still fight![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33580100_MSG0070
rows.name: I'll support you with everything I've got![ST:wait ]
